results.title: Some Long Island employers leaned into remote work, technology to ride out LIRR shutdown impacts
results.description: Contingency plans and workplace policies set in place during COVID helped keep operations uninterrupted at some LI companies.

results.title: Tomorrow’s Thinking
results.description: 65 years ago, in Electronics Weekly’s edition of March 8, 1961, this was the regular column called Tomorrow’s Thinking: The post Tomorrow’s Thinking appeared first on Electronics Weekly .
